metadata.description: Kanban board for Company/Store Profile Setup and Management. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Company/Store Profile Setup and Management
tasks.description: Create company/store profile management including store information, business details, branding preferences, and location setup.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to set up and manage my store profile so that the system is configured for my business needs and preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a store owner is setting up their profile, when they enter store name, address, and contact information, then the profile is saved and used throughout the system
Given a store owner sets store type (retro game store, card store, both), when saved, then relevant features are enabled/configured accordingly
Given a store owner uploads a logo, when the logo is uploaded, then it is displayed in receipts, reports, and customer-facing materials
Given a store owner sets timezone and locale, when saved, then all dates and times are displayed in the selected timezone
Given a store owner has multiple locations, when they add locations, then each location can be managed independently
Given a store owner updates profile information, when changes are saved, then they are immediately reflected throughout the system
tasks.businessValue: Enables proper system configuration and personalization. Required for multi-location support and branding.
tasks.technicalNotes: Store profile in Company table. Support file upload for logos (Azure Blob Storage). Validate timezone and locale values. Ensure multi-tenant data isolation.
successMetrics: Profile completion rate: 90%+ of accounts complete profile setup
Time to complete profile: <5 minutes average
businessRules: Store name is required and must be unique per account
At least one location must be created
Logo file size limited to 5MB, formats: PNG, JPG, SVG
Timezone must be a valid IANA timezone
Store type selection affects available features
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
